name: 39.45" Elowen 3 Shelf Bookcase - Threshold™
description:
Display and organize your collection of books in a sleek and elegant way with the 39-Inch Elowen 3-Shelf Bookcase from Threshold™. This laminated bookcase features a metal frame with three open shelves to provide ample space for your books, vases, and other decorative items. Simply place it along your entryway, in the living room or in any other space for functional and stylish display.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
